fix.item: Fixed Open Graph corruption when Joomla Page Cache is enabled
Fixed random/garbled characters appearing in og:description under cached responses
Fixed double-processing issues affecting meta tags generation
Fixed frontend break in specific cases caused by invalid cached output

change.item: Open Graph metadata now generated strictly from raw Joomla article data (title, introtext, images JSON)
Open Graph description cleaned from HTML, scripts and rendered plugin output
Open Graph tags now injected only via Joomla Document API for full compatibility with caching layers
Improved compatibility with Joomla Page Cache and Cloudflare caching

improvement.item: Improved stability when Snippets and Source plugins are used inside articles
Improved handling of article content parsing for metadata extraction

note.item: This release focuses on cache compatibility and Open Graph stability for production environments
Recommended setup: Joomla Page Cache ON, Joomla Gzip OFF when server or CDN compression is active

addition.item: Added GPL license declaration in all XML manifest files (JED requirement)
Added GPL license headers in all PHP files across the package

change.item: Updated package to be fully compliant with Joomla Extensions Directory (JED) requirements
Cleaned package structure and removed unnecessary system files
Improved installation consistency across different environments

fix.item: Resolved packaging issues that could cause installation inconsistencies

note.item: This is a JED compliance and stability release based on the stable 1.1.3 version
Import/Export functionality has been temporarily removed and will be reintroduced in a future version

fix.item: Fixed DevArt Source not rendering inside Joomla modules
Fixed `{source}` shortcode output appearing as plain text in module positions
Fixed compatibility issues with external widget scripts and iframe embeds

change.item: Unified `{source}` parsing for both articles and modules
Improved compatibility with inline and external JavaScript execution
Updated all package, component and plugin manifests to version 1.1.3

addition.item: Added legacy Code Snippet shortcode support for [codehighlight id=X]

improvement.item: Snippets editor modal now displays newest items first
Code Snippets editor modal now displays newest items first
Improved Code Snippets UI styling (line number separation)

note.item: {source} should be used only for trusted code (scripts, iframes, external widgets)
Legacy [codehighlight id=X] is supported for migration compatibility

addition.item: Enabled automatic updates via Joomla Extensions Update system

change.item: Improved installation and upgrade workflow
Improved package manifest structure
Improved version consistency across package and extensions

fix.item: Minor internal fixes for package handling

note.item: Users on version 1.1.1 need to install this update manually once. After that, updates will work automatically.

addition.item: Snippets system for safe HTML / iframe insertion
Code Snippets with line numbers and copy button
DevArt Source for trusted raw embeds
Lightweight Social Share buttons without external SDKs

change.item: Modular Joomla 6 component and plugins package
Centralized configuration panel
Editor button integrations
Improved cache handling stability
Improved dashboard status reporting
Improved uninstall behavior with data persistence options
Added logging support for debugging

security.item: No script execution allowed in Snippets or Code Snippets
Raw code isolated in DevArt Source
